# Manuel Echavarria Romero — Product Designer & Design Strategist

> Independent product designer and design strategist with 14 years of experience, based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Works globally on product design, UX/UI, brand strategy, design systems, service design, and social-impact design for startups, enterprises, and civic organizations.

Manuel Echavarria Romero (also known as **Manecharo** or **MER**) turns complex problems into elegant, usable products. He has worked across 6 countries — including Colombia, Italy, and Malaysia — with clients ranging from early-stage startups to enterprise teams and civic-tech organizations. His practice integrates user research, strategic thinking, and social-impact considerations into every design decision.

Canonical site: https://manecharo.com
Primary languages: English, Spanish, Italian (working), French (conversational)

## Services

- [Capabilities overview](https://manecharo.com/capabilities): Product Design, UX/UI Design, Brand Strategy & Identity, Design Thinking workshops, Design Systems, Service Design, Social-Impact Design.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://manecharo.com): Overview, featured projects.
- [About](https://manecharo.com/about): Background, education, languages, skills.
- [Work](https://manecharo.com/work): Portfolio of product, brand, and social-impact projects.
- [Capabilities](https://manecharo.com/capabilities): Services and engagement models.
- [Thoughts](https://manecharo.com/thoughts): Field notes, essays, and case reflections.
- [Contact](https://manecharo.com/contact): Email, WhatsApp, and project inquiry form.

## Credentials

- Master's degree — Interior Design, Scuola Politecnica di Design (SPD), Milan, Italy.
- Diploma in Industrial Design, Istituto Europeo di Design (IED), Milan, Italy.
- Certificate — "No Code AI and Machine Learning: Building Data Science Solutions", MIT Professional Education.
- Higher Education Teaching Certificate, Harvard Derek Bok Center.

## Facts

- Based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia; works with clients globally.
- 14 years of professional design experience.
- Speaks English, Spanish, Italian, French; basic Turkish.
- Typical response time: within 48 hours.

## Frequently asked questions

**Who is Manuel Echavarria Romero?**
Manuel Echavarria Romero (also known as Manecharo or MER) is a product designer and design strategist with 14 years of experience. He specializes in product design, UX/UI, brand strategy, and social-impact design, working globally from Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

**What design services does Manuel offer?**
Manuel offers comprehensive design services including Product Design, UX/UI Design, Brand Strategy and Identity, Design Thinking workshops, Design Systems development, Service Design, and Social-Impact Design for startups, enterprises, and civic organizations.

**Where is Manuel based?**
Manuel is based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, and works with clients globally. He has worked across 6 countries including Colombia, Italy (Milan), and Malaysia.

**What is Manuel's design experience?**
14 years of professional design experience across digital products, brand identities, and social-impact projects. Master's degree in Interior Design from SPD Milan, Diploma in Industrial Design from IED Milan, plus certificates from MIT and Harvard.

**What industries has Manuel worked with?**
Startups, technology companies, civic-tech organizations, social-impact initiatives, retail brands, and enterprise clients across fintech, education, healthcare, and e-commerce.

**How can I contact Manuel for a project?**
Via the website contact form at https://manecharo.com/contact, by email at manuelerfreelance@gmail.com, or on WhatsApp at +60 12 658 1025. Typical response within 48 hours.

**What makes Manuel's design approach unique?**
Manuel combines 14 years of experience with a problem-solving mindset focused on turning complex challenges into elegant, usable solutions. His approach integrates user research, strategic thinking, and social-impact considerations into every design decision.

**Does Manuel work with international clients?**
Yes. Based in Kuala Lumpur, he has experience working across time zones and cultures, collaborating with teams in Asia, Europe, and the Americas.
